title: Love.
content:
Love is anterior to life,
    Posterior to death,
    Initial of creation, and
    The exponent of breath.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Love.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
